violations.rule: Back brevity / atomic — no 'and' joining two facts
violations.detail: Back says 'To reassemble packets in order and detect missing segments' — two distinct functions joined by 'and'. Must split into two cards.

violations.rule: Back brevity / atomic — no 'and' joining two facts
violations.detail: Back says 'A SYN packet with an initial sequence number' — bundles the packet type AND the payload detail. Should be split: one card for what packet is sent, one for what it contains.

Cards 2, 3, and 4 form a variant triad describing the three steps of the handshake (SYN, SYN-ACK, ACK). Knowing any two trivially gives the third. These should be collapsed — e.g., a single cloze: 'TCP three-way handshake: {{c1::SYN}} → {{c2::SYN-ACK}} → {{c3::ACK}}' or fewer cards testing the interesting distinctions.

violations.rule: Cloze difficulty — blank guessable from context
violations.detail: 'TCP connection teardown uses {{c1::FIN}} and ACK packets.' — Given that ACK is already shown and the card says 'teardown', FIN is highly guessable (it's the only other well-known TCP control packet for closing). Additionally, this is a 2-item cloze enumeration disguised as a fill-in.

violations.rule: Type distribution — too many definitional cards
violations.detail: Nearly all 9 cards are 'what is/what does' definitional cards. Only card 5 and 7 touch on 'why/how'. The set is well below the ~40% why/how target. Cards should include more causal reasoning, e.g., 'Why does TCP use a three-way handshake instead of two-way?' or 'Why does TCP use exponential backoff?'

'What happens if the handshake fails at any point?' — this is ambiguous. Failure could mean many things (RST sent, ICMP unreachable, timeout, etc.). The answer 'The connection attempt times out' is only one of several valid outcomes.

score_reasoning: Good table format, proper tagging, correct presentation flow. But multiple atomicity violations (cards 2, 5), a mirror-deducible triad (2/3/4), a weak cloze (9), ambiguity (6), and poor type distribution drag the score down significantly.
